decision.reason: one or more frozen coarse annotation, split/donor, capacity, or IMU gates failed
decision.authorizes: no further AEA language-grounding or sensor-side-channel development

acquisition.reason: The frozen viability and sole group-support/power bottleneck conjunction did not pass; storage use is not justified.

limitations: adult partly scripted sensor-format analogue; not developmental evidence or BabyView-like
model-assisted development labels are not human annotations or human inter-rater reliability
31-frame sequences are dense but not continuous video or audio
binary ontology discards fine action subtypes
same-row video capacity is not held-out generalization evidence
development diagnostic only; no confirmatory effect tested
